title: EPERM mkdir unhandled rejection
rationale: Posthog analytics ID persistence is optional user-environment state; UserPosthogManager now handles filesystem failures at the telemetry boundary instead of letting EPERM escape as an unhandled rejection.
fixSummary: Fallback to an in-memory Posthog distinct ID when persisted ID storage cannot be read or written.
problemSignature: Unhandled rejection with EPERM errno from background telemetry bypassed resolveErrorCode and reached Sentry as raw exception.
